The history of the business

Pinki’s cakes was started back in 2022 growing up I have always had the love for baking I think it was born from always helping my mom with the baking for our family seeing how people loved my mom’s baking of course it wasn’t a obvious career choice but it ended up being a side hustle because honesty in the economy we live in now there was no way of only surviving on baking as years went by saw a gap in the market, took the risk and decided to enroll myself in a baking school to up my skills in baking and also learn how to decorate cakes and it was the best decision I ever made doing something that you love brings some sort of comfort to a person and seeing how people loved my cakes and the compliments I kept getting I didn’t regret it at all

The Mission

The MISSION is to provide high quality, delicious, hand-crafted cakes with modern twists to satisfy people, delivering excellence and creativity to every celebration. We aim to bring joy, honor milestones and even provide comfort to our local families and wedding couples

The vision

The VISION is to become the heart of our communities’ celebrations and the number one go to bakery for everyone
